title: Why Cant I Find A Cheap Copy of EoE
display_title: Why Cant I Find A Cheap Copy of EoE
wikitext:
[]: Why Can't I Find A Cheap Copy of EoE?!             Quote Post by facespace » Thu Jan 06, 2011 1:46 pm I am trying to find a new or pretty close to new copy of End of Evangelion on DVD, but every time I find one it is like $80 or $120. That is serious crap! I realize that since ADV went out of business that there isn't a company distributing the older movies, but why the hell did the get so expensive. Can anyone find me a reasonably priced copy of the movie? I would greatly appreciate it.

[]:             Quote Post by InstrumentalityOne » Thu Jan 06, 2011 1:59 pm The english license of EoE is hard to obtain (expensive) for distributors for some reason.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Thu Jan 06, 2011 2:23 pm Just download it. Good DVDs of it with English subs don't exist. We'll have to wait for Funimation to release the BDs of Eva in about 5 years (and they better not touch the spiral credits).

[]:             Quote Post by Mr. Tines » Thu Jan 06, 2011 2:35 pm The legitimate way of doing this would be to get a copy of the Japanese Renewal release of EoE and mux in subs (as per http://forum.evageeks.org/viewtopic.php?t=10444) using the Bochan Bird screenplay and DIY timing. Which (apart possibly from the script source) what Zhentarim DivX did. Oh, and it's Manga Entertainment (aka Mangle), not ADV, who had the rights to EoE.

[]: Re: Why Can't I Find A Cheap Copy of EoE?!             Quote Post by The Eva Monkey » Thu Jan 06, 2011 2:49 pm facespace wrote: I realize that since ADV went out of business that there isn't a company distributing the older movies

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Thu Jan 06, 2011 3:24 pm I suppose now would be a bad time to bring up that I was recently in a shop which had 2 copies of EoE and 2 copies of Death and Rebirth all for £1.50 each? Keep looking in smaller places, you might get lucky and find somewhere like the place I found. If play.com delivers to the US then go there. They had EoE for £10-£20 last time I checked. EDIT: Region 1, assuming that since you said $ you live in the US

[]:             Quote Post by RMZX » Thu Jan 06, 2011 4:23 pm I got the Mangle edition for only 4 bucks. But then again I intended on getting Death and Rebirth and not EoE, so I got the right case, wrong movie. Not trying to brag or anything, the quality of the video is awful just like everybody else says (and knows).

[]:             Quote Post by svenge » Thu Jan 06, 2011 5:59 pm My advice is just to be vigilant on eBay. You keep looking for long enough, and you'll usually find what you want at a reasonable price. That's how I got my R2J DTS movie set for $8 a while back. Looks 10x better than the Manga Ent. set, I'll tell you!

[]: ...unless you're in liquidus118's bizarro world, of course.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Thu Jan 06, 2011 6:33 pm I bought mine used on Amazon.com for about $35. It's not an easy movie to find... liquidus118 wrote: I suppose now would be a bad time to bring up that I was recently in a shop which had 2 copies of EoE and 2 copies of Death and Rebirth all for £1.50 each?

[]:             Quote Post by facespace » Thu Jan 06, 2011 11:45 pm That's a bummer.

[]:             Quote Post by Animejunkie » Fri Jan 07, 2011 3:27 am I gotta consider myself lucky then... picked up my EoE and Death and Rebirth for 17 bucks still sealed...=D

[]: Re: ...unless you're in liquidus118's bizarro world, of cour             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Fri Jan 07, 2011 11:02 am Killer Bee wrote: YOU BASTARD I HATE YOU

[]:             Quote Post by Doktor » Fri Jan 07, 2011 8:52 pm A shop in my city had it used for a reasonable price (less than $16, I think?) last time I was there, and if you could reimburse me and it's still there I'd be willing to send it to you. I'm not sure how comfortable you'd feel giving your address to a stranger, though.

[]:             Quote Post by Crazy Packers Fan » Mon Jan 10, 2011 5:10 am I got a used copy (good condition, watched maybe once) at Colossalcon for $5. They had a "flea market" of sorts where people were trying to sell stuff for cheap, and someone had it at the price of $15. He said it scarred him for life, so when I asked if I could buy it for $5, he readily accepted, just wanting to get rid of it.

[]:             Quote Post by KnightmareX13 » Mon Jan 10, 2011 3:13 pm Crazy Packers Fan wrote: I got a used copy (good condition, watched maybe once) at Colossalcon for $5. They had a "flea market" of sorts where people were trying to sell stuff for cheap, and someone had it at the price of $15. He said it scarred him for life, so when I asked if I could buy it for $5, he readily accepted, just wanting to get rid of it.

[]:             Quote Post by Clover » Mon Jan 10, 2011 3:29 pm Crazy Packers Fan wrote: He said it scarred him for life, so when I asked if I could buy it for $5, he readily accepted, just wanting to get rid of it.

[]: Now give me some of your magic foreign money.             Quote Post by Killer Bee » Mon Jan 10, 2011 6:44 pm liquidus118 wrote: If it makes you feel any better I had recently spent £40-50 on films which were also in the shop and would have added up to £10-15.

[]:             Quote Post by Dr. Webster » Mon Jan 10, 2011 7:04 pm If you can afford to drop about $30, there are many used copies in "Very Good" condition on Amazon: http://www.amazon.com/gp/offer-listing/B000068OJ1/ref=sr_1_1_olp?ie=UTF8&qid=1294704142&sr=8-1&condition=used

[]:             Quote Post by Trajan » Tue Jan 11, 2011 4:46 pm Crazy Packers Fan wrote: He said it scarred him for life, so when I asked if I could buy it for $5, he readily accepted, just wanting to get rid of it.

[]:             Quote Post by liquidus118 » Tue Jan 11, 2011 5:12 pm Trajan wrote: Huh, EoE wasn't that disturbing (then again I seem to have an immunity to "freaky stuff" as some of my friends put it). Got mine on eBay for $35 although I originally settled on $25...well that's eBay for ya. I was originally going to download it but the security on those kinds of sites worry me.
